data.title: EDU surged over 34% in a short period, currently trading at $0.058.
data.description: Market data shows that, possibly influenced by CZ's new book, EDU briefly surged by over 34%, breaking through $0.059, and is currently trading at $0.058.

data.title: USD1 Deposit Rate Surges to 35.81% Amid WLFI Transactions
data.description: The deposit rate for USD1 has unexpectedly surged to 35.81%, raising questions about the current financial situation. Analyst @ai_9684xtpa posted on X that over the past five days, the WLFI strategic reserve address has deposited 3 billion WLFI tokens into Dolomite, borrowing 50.44 million USD1. This activity has led to a complete depletion of USD1 on Dolomite, with the borrowing rate now at 30% and liquidity showing a deficit of 232,000 tokens. Potential investors are advised to consider the timing of USD1 withdrawals before seeking interest gains.

data.title: India's Central Bank Governor Projects CPI Inflation at 4.6% This Year
data.description: India's central bank governor has projected the country's Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation rate to be 4.6% for the current year. According to Jin10, this forecast reflects ongoing economic assessments and policy considerations by the Reserve Bank of India. The projection is part of the central bank's broader strategy to manage inflationary pressures and ensure economic stability. The governor's statement underscores the importance of monitoring inflation trends as India navigates its economic challenges.

data.title: Whale Leverages 20x to Trade Bitcoin and Ethereum Worth $40 Million
data.description: On April 8, a significant transaction was detected by Onchain Lens. According to BlockBeats, a whale identified as "0x049" utilized a 20x leverage to go long on 279.8 BTC and 8,918 ETH, with a total value of $40 million.

data.title: CZ stated that he did not sell his holdings before the LUNA crash and refused to cash out his $1.6 billion profit; he still holds some of the related tokens.
data.description: In his "Binance Life" segment, CZ recounted the Terra incident, stating that Binance invested approximately $3 million in Terra in 2018, acquiring LUNA tokens. Before the collapse, the token's value had risen to approximately $1.6 billion. He said that before the dramatic price fluctuations of LUNA in 2022, the team discussed reducing their holdings but ultimately decided against it. This was partly due to concerns that a concentrated sell-off would exacerbate market panic, and partly because a large-scale exit would require a lengthy process, while the market was already in a rapid downturn. Furthermore, he stated that he did not want the outside world to perceive the platform as "leaving before retail investors." Currently, some of the relevant tokens are still held.

data.title: The U.S. Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) is planning to introduce regulations for stablecoins, clarifying requirements for reserves and redemptions.
data.description: The Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) has proposed a draft of new rules to regulate stablecoin issuers under its jurisdiction, in accordance with the GENIUS Act. The draft rules cover requirements related to reserves, redemption, capital, risk management, and custody. The FDIC stated that relevant reserve deposits will be insured, but this protection will not directly cover stablecoin holders. The regulator has also solicited public comments on the details of the rules for 60 days. This proposal represents a further step in implementing the GENIUS Act, and the related regulatory framework is expected to be gradually developed.

data.title: CZ: During his imprisonment, he volunteered to introduce cryptocurrency knowledge to inmates.
data.description: In his memoir, "Binance Life," CZ mentions that during the later stages of his imprisonment, he was transferred to a halfway house, where he was approved to volunteer. One of his volunteer tasks was to help create cryptocurrency educational materials for inmates, although CZ stated that he basically copied and pasted them all from Binance Academy.

data.title: CZ: The Chinese name of Binance is He Yiqi, and the process reflects Binance's decisive and efficient work style.
data.description: In his memoir, *Binance Life*, CZ mentions, "On June 17, 2017, He Yi was in Shanghai attending a seminar. I invited her to my office to help us revise the white paper… He Yi walked into our office, pointed to the printed white paper on the table, and her first words were: 'Your current Chinese name sounds like a supermarket.' I asked her if she had any better suggestions. She thought for a moment and said, 'How about 'Binance'?' Allan (Note: CZ's former colleague, Binance's founding product manager) and I exchanged glances and said, 'Okay.' She was a little surprised: 'Are you sure you don't want to reconsider? Don't you want to ask others? Or find a feng shui master to consult? Naming is a big deal.' Allan and I both said, 'No need to ask. Let's move on to the next part.'" "That's the origin of the Chinese name 'Binance.' Actually, she didn't know that after the English name Binance was decided, we struggled for a long time with the Chinese name until she blurted out 'Binance.' You can see Binance's style of doing things from the naming: decisive and efficient, without dragging things out. We make decisions quickly, don't like endless meetings, and get things done as soon as we say it."

data.title: Israel Shells Southern Lebanon Amid U.S.-Iran Ceasefire
data.description: Israel has launched shelling on the southern Lebanese city of Barashit following a statement from Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu's office. According to NS3.AI, the statement clarified that Lebanon is not included in the two-week ceasefire agreement between the United States and Iran. The Israeli military conducted the shelling today, while Netanyahu's office expressed support for the truce between the U.S. and Iran.

data.title: XRP Rises 5% Amid Tactical Breakout Above Resistance Zone
data.description: XRP experienced a 5% increase, reaching approximately $1.38 after surpassing the $1.325–$1.33 resistance zone. According to NS3.AI, the move was supported by strong trading volume. However, the overall market structure remains bearish, and the breakout appears tactical rather than confirmed.

data.title: CZ: Around 2020, it acquired a 20% stake in Swipe Wallet for tens of millions of US dollars and launched Binance Card in Europe.
data.description: In his autobiography, *Binance Life*, CZ mentions early information about the "Binance Card," stating: "In February 2020, I was introduced to Swipe Wallet, a Philippine crypto startup. It was originally a wallet, but later transformed into a crypto debit card. Users pay with cryptocurrency, and merchants receive fiat currency, making it almost seamless for users. The idea itself wasn't new; the biggest challenge was finding a banking partner. For crypto enthusiasts, it eliminated the hassle of selling cryptocurrency for fiat currency, allowing cryptocurrency to be used directly for everyday payments. At the time, Swipe wasn't officially operational, but wanted to acquire users through a partnership with Binance. Founder Joseph suggested exchanging 80% of Swipe's shares for a partnership. He was clever; he later sold the remaining 20% ​​to us for tens of millions of dollars. Subsequently, Binance launched the Binance Card in Europe, which quickly became a new favorite among users."

data.title: CZ: Li Lin's detention was due to Xu Mingxing reporting him to the police.
data.description: In his autobiography, *Binance Life*, CZ recalled the details of Xu Mingxing and Li Lin's detentions in 2020, stating: "On October 16, 2020, OKCoin suddenly announced an indefinite suspension of withdrawals… Rumors circulated that Chinese police had placed Xu Mingxing under 'soft detention,' keeping him in a hotel and cutting him off from outside contact… Everyone feared the police would use user funds, causing panic in the Chinese market. Five weeks later, on November 26, 2020, Xu Mingxing was released from 'soft detention,' and OKCoin resumed withdrawal services… Two days after Xu Mingxing's release, on November 28, 2020, Huobi founder Li Lin and 17 other executives were arrested by police at one of their public VIP events… Li Lin had been 'soft detained' for 90 days. After his release, he decided to leave the industry and put Huobi up for sale. Binance was asked if they were willing to take over, but we declined. Ultimately, Li Lin sold Huobi to Justin Sun." “Five years later, at a dinner in 2025, I met Li Lin again after 11 years. Li Lin told me that he had seen a screenshot showing that Xu Mingxing had personally reported him to the Chinese police, and it was this report that led to his arrest.”

data.title: CZ: I was the last person to find out I had been pardoned.
data.description: In his autobiography, "Binance Life," CZ mentioned that the "US presidential pardon" sounded like the ending of a fantasy movie. During the time his personal X account remained silent that day, he was actually on his way to a meeting with the Kyrgyz government, so he was the last person to know that he had been pardoned.

data.title: Silver Inventory Stress: COMEX Coverage at 13.4% of Open Interest
data.description: According to NS3.AI, BloFin Research has highlighted concerns regarding the silver market, noting that the COMEX registered silver inventory covers approximately 13.4% of the 576 million ounces of open interest, which is considered a stress territory. Additionally, BloFin Research pointed out the March 2026 delivery of around 46.1 million ounces and a 12–13% SHFE premium over COMEX as indicators of a tight physical supply.

data.description: On April 8, the KOSPI index in South Korea experienced a significant increase, rising by 7% within the day. According to BlockBeats, the index is currently reported at 5882.91 points. This substantial growth highlights a notable shift in the market dynamics.

data.title: USD/CHF Experiences 1% Decline
data.description: The USD/CHF currency pair has seen a 1% drop in its value today, currently trading at 0.7896. According to ChainCatcher, this decline reflects fluctuations in the foreign exchange market. The movement in the USD/CHF rate is being closely monitored by traders and analysts, as it may impact international trade and investment strategies.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Announces Plans to Address Hormuz Strait Shipping Congestion
data.description:
U.S. President Donald Trump announced on April 8 that the United States will assist in resolving the shipping congestion issue in the Hormuz Strait. According to Jin10, Trump stated that there will be numerous positive actions and significant wealth creation. He mentioned on social media that Iran can begin its reconstruction process, and the U.S. will ship various materials and 'stay there' to ensure everything proceeds smoothly. Trump also claimed this would mark a 'golden era for the Middle East.'

U.S. media reported on April 7 that Iran and Oman plan to charge a transit fee for the Hormuz Strait. However, this information has not yet been confirmed by Iranian officials.

data.title: CZ: He proactively went to the US to plead guilty in an effort to minimize the impact on Binance users and the overall crypto industry.
data.description: In his new book, *Binance Life*, CZ stated that in 2023 he voluntarily traveled to the United States and admitted to violating relevant provisions of the U.S. Bank Secrecy Act, primarily concerning Binance's early provision of services to U.S. users without proper registration. CZ stated that given the increasingly stringent regulatory environment at the time, failing to make this decision could have brought greater uncertainty and potential impact to Binance's operations, BNB holders, and the industry's development. CZ indicated that he chose to address the risk by personally assuming legal responsibility in order to reduce the impact on platform users and the overall crypto industry, and to ensure the continued operation of the business.

data.title: Major Losses Recorded on Hyperliquid Platform Amid BTC Holdings
data.description:
On April 8, significant losses were reported on the Hyperliquid platform, according to BlockBeats. Hyperinsight monitoring revealed that the largest BTC holdings on the platform are associated with two addresses, 'pension-usdt.eth' and 'Strategy 对手盘,' both of which opened short positions earlier this month. Today, these addresses recorded losses of $4.92 million and $4.62 million, respectively, making them the top two daily losers on the platform.

The 'pension-usdt.eth' address also topped the weekly loss chart. Its holdings include a 3x BTC short position valued at $71.29 million with an average price of $67,992, resulting in a floating loss of $3.28 million. Additionally, it holds a 3x ETH long position valued at $44.76 million with an average price of $2,131, incurring a floating loss of $2.11 million.

The 'Strategy 对手盘' address holds a 40x BTC short position valued at $75.86 million with an average price of $69,036, leading to a floating loss of $2.44 million. This address is currently the largest BTC short holder on the platform.

The addresses involved are 0x0ddf9bae2af4b874b96d287a5ad42eb47138a902 and 0x94d3735543ecb3d339064151118644501c933814.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $64.6704 million yesterday, with Fidelity's FETH ETF experiencing the largest net outflow at $48.2093 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $64.6704 million yesterday (April 7th, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was the Fidelity ETF (FETH), with a net outflow of $48.2093 million. FETH's historical total net inflow has reached $2.283 billion. This was followed by the BlackRock ETF (ETHA), with a single-day net outflow of $16.4611 million. ETHA's historical total net inflow has reached $11.607 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs is $11.979 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization) of 4.69%. The historical cumulative net inflow has reached $11.536 billion.
